name: Python HTTP Server Spawned
description: Detects Python simple HTTP server being used for file staging or exfiltration
query:
// Detect Python HTTP server module execution
// Often used by attackers for file transfer
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)python.*(-m\s+http\.server|-m\s+SimpleHTTPServer)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
